message:
fix(ui): correct attention table width calculation and add test coverage

Fixes and test improvements for the UI package:

## Attention View Width Calculation

Fixes column width calculation in ComputeAttentionView() to properly
account for separator characters. Previously, the calculation subtracted
only the fixed column widths without considering the " | " separators
between columns.

Change: `width - 4 - 18 - 10 - 3` -> `width - 4 - 18 - 10 - sepWidth`
where sepWidth = len(" | ") * (len(headers) - 1)

This prevents the "Reason" column from being narrower than intended
and avoids potential text truncation issues.

## Test Coverage

Comprehensive test additions for:
- Attention view edge cases with various widths
- Background worker lifecycle and metrics
- Coverage for UI update message handling
- Edge cases in component interactions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
